title: OrangNitro Modpack
description: OrangNitro is the ultimate Minecraft Modpack for group play! Get ready for overhauled biomes, mobs, resources, and structures. It's time to level up your gameplay!
body:
Welcome to OrangNitro, the ultimate Minecraft Modpack designed for group gameplay! Get ready for an immersive and exciting gaming experience with a plethora of mods that will take your Minecraft journey to the next level. With YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments, Better Desert Temples, and Better Dungeons redesign vanilla structures into thrilling new adventures. While Create adds an arsenal of tools and blocks for endless creativity. Friends&Foes brings forgotten mobs back to the game, Join your friends and discover a new world of Minecraft with OrangNitro!

--------

OLD VERSION below 2.0

Modlist and Configs files are on github: https://github.com/etncc/OrangNitro-MC-Modpack

Both of Xaero's Mods link to Curseforge below for use in this mod pack.
Xaero's Minimap - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap
Xaero's World Map - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map

Thanks to UHQ_GAMES I have permission to use in this modpack with credit!!
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/regions-unexplored
